title: cp: consolidate and simplify
body:
Consolidate and simplify code in `podman cp` a bit.  PR #11049
introduced some code duplicates that were worth tackling.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Thank you @vrothberg! Can you please update the manpage? I have made the changes, just add them to your commit if possible. If you want I can open a new PR to do that, but would be irrelevant I think. 
https://gist.github.com/infiniteregrets/9b75f48c50dc0d060cf4aaf67d29cd8c (updated page with manpage syntax)

> Thank you @vrothberg! Can you please update the manpage? I have made the changes, just add them to your commit if possible. If you want I can open a new PR to do that, but would be irrelevant I think.
> https://gist.github.com/infiniteregrets/9b75f48c50dc0d060cf4aaf67d29cd8c (updated page with manpage syntax)

I updated the man page already in #11049.  If you want more changes, please open a PR.
